title: Ripples
description: Client Forge Mod for improving audio experience : Live Audio Spectrum / Sound Map
body:
![Ripples Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26a7c6f9de7db6536507e323104d56cf6f05c96c.png)

# Ripples

This mod improves Minecraft in-game audio experience.

Currently it provides mainly 3 features, **Audio Spectrum, Sound Map, Music Title Toast**.

They are customizable, for example, their opacity, color (including gradient), rendering styles.

Please edit config, or open in-game setting by pressing *Alt+R*.

This is **Client-Only mod**, you don't have to install in server

---
# Live Audio Spectrum
![Live Audio Spectrum](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4a2402c3452bcbdd7ffa49733d38022a4ad9d76.jpeg)

It shows Live Audio Spectrum for playing sounds in-game, it supports sound effects, bgm.

You can customize the spectrum shape by selecting combinations of Spectrum Type and Spectrum Style.

The example image is a combination of Type : Hotbar / Style : Blocks.

---
# Sound Map
![Sound Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaa7c28a1010773db7b294b153a6b414754fc502.jpeg)

You can use Sound Map instead of audio spectrum, it shows playing audio source direction on screen.

This is also customizable, the example image is Type : Radar
